title: ASR Outdoor 4 Piece Beginners Gold Panning Kit | Trowel Vials Gold Pan
description:
This gold panning starter kit is a great way to get started making your fortune in precious metals. With the price of gold skyrocketing, now is the perfect time to start prospecting. This set includes a trowel for digging; a pan to separate the gold from the dirt; and two different-sized vials to store your gold. Not only is this set good for gold panning, some of these items have a variety of applications. The trowel is a good multipurpose digging tool and has a 4" measuring scale on the scoop. The vials can be used to store any small items. Don't miss out on this gold panning starter kit while the price of gold is still high!
